item.title: School misconduct case
item.description: A discussion of a case involving misconduct within a school setting, focusing on verified details, investigation, and broader implications. What lessons can be learned from this situation?

item.title: Partner Joins In With Coverup

item.title: The Story Behind the Workers Institute Cult
item.description: An examination of the Workers Institute of Marxism-Leninism-Mao Zedong Thought and the events surrounding it. What led to its rise and downfall?

item.description: A factual look at a case often referred to as involving Japan’s youngest killer, focusing on verified details and broader context. What impact did it have?
